creator: hrs@FreeBSD.org
text: texmf.cnf should be installed by devel/tex-kpathsea.  I cannot investigate why your environment did not have it because your report does not include information about tex-kpathsea package.  Please re-submit the same PR with more details (specifically, log files of package building) and/or try the officially-provided package of tex-kpathsea if you need help.
